title: arabis ciliata
intro: Arabis ciliata, also known as rock cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to dispel cold and relieve fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe respiratory issues and boost the immune system. Arabis ciliata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
